1.description: get Finnmark county geometry and fylkesnummer

2.description: get 200-year flood zones (gjentaksintervall=200) nationwide, limited to attributes

3.description: reduce 200-year flood zones to Finnmark by intersecting with fylke geometry

4.description: get buildings in municipalities of Finnmark by filtering kommunenummer prefix using fylkesnummer from step 1

5.description: find buildings that intersect Finnmark 200-year flood zones

7.description: get municipality names and kommunenummer for labeling results

8.description: attach kommunenavn to aggregated counts by kommunenummer

9.description: sort municipalities by building count descending
